summary: Iteration 12 Testing Complete - All 15 new features verified. Backend APIs (user notifications, admin mark-seen, delete endpoints) all working. Frontend features (groupe MatrixNews text, avatar→/profil navigation, bell badge, media panel) all confirmed.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/my-notifications - Returns user notifications with unread_count
PUT /api/my-notifications/read-all - Marks all user notifications as read
PUT /api/admin/notifications/mark-seen - Resets admin bell badge count
DELETE /api/admin/articles/{id} - Allows admin to delete any article
DELETE /api/admin/properties/{id} - Allows admin to delete any property
DELETE /api/articles/{id} - Allows admin to delete other users' articles
DELETE /api/properties/{id} - Allows admin to delete other users' properties
Role approval creates user notifications with 'groupe MatrixNews' text
frontend_ui_tests: Registration page shows 'groupe MatrixNews' in warning text for auteur/agent roles
Profile page displays user notifications (approval/rejection) with 'groupe MatrixNews' text
Avatar click in header navigates directly to /profil (not dropdown)
Chevron button (ChevronDown) opens the profile dropdown menu
Admin notification bell visible in header
Bell badge shows count of unseen pending notifications
Article editor shows 'Média' button in toolbar
Clicking Média opens media panel with Upload/URL tabs
Media URL input allows inserting images/videos by URL

critical_code_review_comments: User notification system well-implemented with proper types (role_approved/role_rejected)
Admin mark-seen endpoint correctly uses 'seen' field separate from 'status'
Delete endpoints properly check admin role before allowing deletion of others' content
Frontend correctly separates avatar click (→profile) from chevron (→dropdown)
Media panel in AdvancedRichEditor supports both file upload and URL insertion

test_user.note: Approved as auteur, has role_approved notification

seed_data_creation: Test user notiftest@test.com already exists with approved auteur role and notification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 12 features working: 1) 'groupe MatrixNews' text appears in registration warning and user notifications, 2) GET /api/my-notifications returns user notifications, 3) PUT /api/my-notifications/read-all marks read, 4) Avatar button [data-testid='profile-avatar-btn'] navigates to /profil, 5) Chevron button [data-testid='profile-dropdown-btn'] opens dropdown, 6) Admin delete endpoints allow deleting other users' content, 7) Bell badge uses 'seen' field and mark-seen endpoint, 8) Media panel in editor has Upload/URL tabs with [data-testid='insert-media-btn'], [data-testid='media-panel'], [data-testid='media-url-input']
